Conversion fell from ~12% to 0% for 7 days.", "verified": true}

turns.label: priority
turns.raw_text: {"explanation": "Every funnel spanning the DST boundary is affected; the 'Signup conversion' funnel dropped from ~12% to 0% for 7 days, and the bug generalizes across teams.", "priority": "P1", "dollar_value": 25000}

turns.label: presentation
turns.raw_text:
{"title": "fix(funnels): Handle DST timezone conversion in step windows", "summary": "Users see 0% conversion on any funnel spanning the recent DST change.

## Problem
Funnel step windows compare timezone-naive datetimes, so after the 2026-03-08 DST boundary step 2 events fall outside the window in funnel.py.

## Impact
The Signup conversion funnel dropped from ~12% to 0% for 7 days, and every team with a funnel across the DST boundary is hit.

## Solution
Normalize step windows to the project timezone before bucketing so DST shifts no longer drop events."}
